title: No Pro-Abortion Task Force Act
plain_summary: This bill stops the government from using tax money to pay for a special group called the Reproductive Healthcare Access Task Force. This group was started in 2022 by the Department of Health and Human Services to help people get reproductive health care. The bill also says the government cannot fund any new groups that would do the same job as this task force. The people who wrote this bill do not want the government to spend money helping with reproductive health care access.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
subjects: Department of Health and Human Services

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the No Pro-Abortion Task Force Act.

sections.title: Section 2 Prohibition Against Use of Federal Funds for HHS Reproductive Healthcare Access Task Force
sections.text: No federal government money can be used to pay for the HHS Reproductive Healthcare Access Task Force. This task force was announced by the Secretary of Health and Human Services on January twenty-first, two thousand twenty-two. Federal money also cannot be used for any replacement task force or any task force that does basically the same work.
